paragraphs: Backend Engineer with strong foundations in Java, data structures, and backend development. Currently working at Obens, building scalable ERP systems with Spring Boot, MongoDB, and Kubernetes.

My journey includes full-stack projects with React and TypeScript, with a focus on code quality, performance optimization, and system design. Student at 1337 Coding School (42 Network), building low-level systems and real-time applications.
Based in Ben guerir, Morocco, actively contributing to production systems and exploring opportunities in distributed systems and cloud architecture.
